LanguageData.VPE_BendProbability.description: Creates a ripple of cosmic scale that will force something to happen.
LanguageData.VPE_BendProbability.label: bend probability
LanguageData.VPE_HealthSwap.description: Through the law of equivalent exchange, returns the primary target’s vitality to its origin, transferring all foreign objects and injuries to the secondary target.
LanguageData.VPE_HealthSwap.label: health swap
LanguageData.VPE_HeatFocus.description: Initiates harmonic meditation which converts all accumulated heat into psyfocus after 10 seconds. Can neither overcharge psyfocus nor heat dump.
LanguageData.VPE_HeatFocus.label: heat focus
LanguageData.VPE_LocationSwap.description: Using precision skipgates, swaps the positions of the caster and a visible target.
LanguageData.VPE_LocationSwap.label: location swap
LanguageData.VPE_LuckTransfer.description: Creates a rift in karmic balance by shifting the negative karma from the first target onto the second target, as well as receiving their positive karma. Only affects combat and the duration scales with the first target’s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_LuckTransfer.label: luck transfer
LanguageData.VPE_Mindcontrol.description: Psychically dominate a target for a brief period, scaling with their psychic sensitivity, giving the caster a second body. However, it’s difficult being two people at once.
LanguageData.VPE_Mindcontrol.label: mind control
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuidance.description: Dampens the caster’s sight, hearing, movement and manipulation in exchange for overcharging the target’s own physical abilities.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuidance.label: psychic guidance
LanguageData.VPE_SkillRoll.description: Initiates a shift in the target’s knowledge and accumulated skills, attempting to rebalance them somewhat chaotically with some beneficial guidance. The strain puts the caster in a coma.
LanguageData.VPE_SkillRoll.label: skillroll
LanguageData.VPE_Transmutation.description: Through the law of equivalent exchange, converts a targeted (stack of) item(s) into an item of equal or lesser value. Completely unpredictable.
LanguageData.VPE_Transmutation.label: transmutation
LanguageData.VPE_TransmuteStone.description: Designates an area of stone which will have its minerals swapped out for a single, randomized type from an underground strata.
LanguageData.VPE_TransmuteStone.label: transmute stone
